name: Proposal Engagement
summary: Estimates a user’s proposal impact by rewarding highly rated proposals that were funded and completed, and penalizing proposals that were not funded (especially if community ratings were low). Newer proposals can matter more if time decay is enabled.
description:
### What this algorithm is
This algorithm estimates a user’s impact through proposals.

It looks at each proposal, decides whether it should count as a reward or a penalty, and then applies that result to the proposal’s owners (the proposer plus any listed team members). Each owner receives the full result for that proposal (it is not split).

### What increases or decreases the score
- Funded and completed proposals increase the score, especially when community ratings are strong.
- Unfunded proposals decrease the score, especially when community ratings are weak.
- Newer proposals can matter more than older proposals if time decay is enabled.

### Important scope / limitations
Only proposals from rounds 31, 36, and 107 are eligible. Proposals from other rounds are skipped because those rounds do not have reliable team-member ownership data.

### What data is used
No file upload is needed. The algorithm fetches proposals, users, and reviews from DeepFunding Portal data.

### Outputs
- A per-user CSV with user_id and proposal_engagement.
- A JSON details file with per-proposal breakdown and skip reasons (useful for auditing and debugging).

inputs.label: Funded & Concluded Reward Weight
inputs.description: How strongly funded and completed proposals increase the final score (0 disables rewards).

inputs.label: Unfunded Penalty Weight
inputs.description: How strongly unfunded proposals decrease the final score (0 disables penalties).

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: How many months back proposals are allowed to count; older proposals are ignored.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: How quickly older proposals lose influence each month (0 means no decay).

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), proposal_engagement (numeric score).

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-proposal intermediate values (rewards, penalties, time weights). For debugging and auditing.
